title: Armor+
body:
This adds new armor and advancements.

For example It adds ruby, topaz, copper, amethyst, and prismarine. It also adds infused items, and armor. You need to traverse much land to be able to get all the items and enough of them to craft the best armor. Aka infused armor and tools. it took forever for me to achieve that armor and so that should be a challenge so have fun.

This will always be for forge, I wont update to fabric.
